form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wentworth Park (29.95) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length fifth. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Has ability and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wentworth Park (29.95) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length fifth. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 520m in 29.95 last start, beating Boston Strong. Looks the one to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 520m in 29.95 last start, beating Boston Strong. Looks the one to beat.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at Nowra latest but prior to that clocked a slick 36.42 over 630m when just missed, at Nowra. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at Nowra latest but prior to that clocked a slick 36.42 over 630m when just missed, at Nowra. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and ran wide.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 35.36 as a strongly fancied winner over 622m at this track. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 35.36 as a strongly fancied winner over 622m at this track. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Steps up to 622m for the first time. Last appeared when third over 457m at Temora nine days ago. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Steps up to 622m for the first time. Last appeared when third over 457m at Temora nine days ago. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Wentworth Park over 520m. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Wentworth Park over 520m. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased for some distance soon after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 2 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Bandit Lynne beaten 3.5 lengths (29.85) in a Grade 5. Looks a solid hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 2 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Bandit Lynne beaten 3.5 lengths (29.85) in a Grade 5. Looks a solid hope.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a NG at Wentworth Park when a 3.5 lengths second but did run a swift 29.80 over the 520m journey. Place prospects appear best again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a NG at Wentworth Park when a 3.5 lengths second but did run a swift 29.80 over the 520m journey. Place prospects appear best again.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in six tries. Last start 8th over 400m at Maitland. Hard to envisage a win.
